ThrowGiftItem.101.2: Adds 10s to the current level's countdown.
ThrowGiftItem.103.2: Slows down the countdown and moving basket speed for 15s (does not affect item duration or other speeds).
ThrowGiftItem.105.2: All Sherlocks launched within 15s will count as any color.
ThrowGiftItem.106.2: The next-launched Sherlock instantly lands in the nearest basket below its flight path.
ThrowGiftItem.107.2: The next-launched Sherlock ignores and passes through all obstacles along its flight path.
ThrowGiftItem.108.2: Allows the next-launched Sherlock to display its full trajectory and permanently retains the flight path.
